title: Future simple intro: je serai, j’aurai, je ferai
subtitle: Recognize and use a few true future forms.
duolingoBridge: A2 begins to move beyond aller + infinitive.
overview: Knowledge point 1: futur simple is often written and used for plans/predictions.
Knowledge point 2: start with the most common irregular stems.

items.fr: Demain, je serai à la maison.
items.en: Tomorrow, I will be at home.

items.fr: J’aurai plus de temps la semaine prochaine.
items.en: I will have more time next week.
items.es: Tendré más tiempo la próxima semana.

items.fr: Je ferai du café demain matin.
items.en: I will make coffee tomorrow morning.
items.es: Haré café mañana por la mañana.

items.fr: Nous irons à Paris en train.
items.en: We will go to Paris by train.
I will be able to come Friday.
